div.h1: Hardware Soul: Execution Ports for SIMD Instructions

div.p: Why Shuffle+Add Wins: • Shuffle (Port 5) and Add (Port 0/1) use different ports • CPU can issue both in the same cycle • Out-of-order engine keeps pipeline full Why hadd Loses: • hadd can ONLY execute on Port 5 • Multiple hadd instructions serialize • 3-5 cycle latency blocks dependent ops

text.tspan: // These can issue in SAME cycle!
// These can issue in SAME cycle!
